task.title: Power Cleaning Using the Product Control Panel
task.shortdesc: You can run a Power Cleaning using the control panel on your product.

context.p: You can run a Power Cleaning using the control panel on your product.
context.note: After a Power Cleaning, you must turn off the product and wait at least 12 hours before running another Power Cleaning.

step.cmd: Make sure there are no errors on the LCD screen and the output tray is extended.
Visually check the ink levels and make sure each ink tank is at least one-third full.

info.note: If you run a Power Cleaning when the ink levels are low, you may damage the product.

step.cmd: Press the home button, if necessary.
Follow the instructions on the LCD screen to run the Power Cleaning. A confirmation is displayed when Power Cleaning is complete.
When the Power Cleaning is finished, run a nozzle check.

result.p: If the print quality did not improve, turn off the product and wait at least 12 hours before running another nozzle check. Run Print Head Cleaning or Power Cleaning depending on the printed pattern.
If the print quality does not improve after running the Power Cleaning utility multiple times, contact MetR for support.
